item.title: Electronics
item.description:
My Plan

My plan for the next year is to self learn some electronics supplementing my learning by joining a university society on the topic. Some reasourecs i have found to help me include the follwing:

  1. https://www.electronics-tutorials.ws

Projects

Some projects i will undertake include the following:

  1. Shortwave Radio Transmitter Receiver Kit - Forty-9er 3W

item.title: Hacking
item.description:
Introduction

At university i attend a hacking club where i sometimes compete in Capture the flag competitions, the main areas that i focus on in these ctfs are cryptography and binary exploitation.

Ctf Events

Some ctf’s i have attended during my time at university include.

  1. Pwned7 Qualifiers
  2. Sheffield Siege

item.title: First Post
item.description:
Who am i

My name is Jamie Grant and i am a student studying a Mathematics.

What i do

My hobbies include but are not limited to:

  1. Mathematics
  2. Cryptography
  3. Hacking
  4. Amateur Radio
  5. Programming

My goals

My goals for the next few years include the following:

  1. Gain a underestanding of quantum mechanics.
  2. Gain pratical experience with soldering and electronics
  3. Earn a RSGB radio intermediate license.
